title: wreduce causes muxcover to not identify covering opportunity

features.name: wreduce destroys muxcover covering opportunity
features.description: Code should include a nested if-else structure forming a 3-to-1 mux with parameterized select width using $clog2(N) and part-selects using +: operator

features.name: clog2_in_port_sizing
features.description: Code should include a port declaration sized with $clog2 of a parameter for the select signal width

features.name: part_select_with_plus_colon_operator
features.description: Code should include part-selects using the +: operator with parameterized stride to select variable-width slices

features.name: default_x_assignment_before_conditionals
features.description: Code should include a default assignment of dont-care value before nested if-else conditionals in combinational always block
